expectations.text: Review identifies SRP violation - OrderService handles too many concerns
expectations.evidence: Finding #7 (P2): 'SRP violation: OrderService is a god class' - correctly demoted from P1 to P2 with 6 responsibilities listed.

expectations.text: Review flags N+1 query pattern in getUserOrders (nested API calls per order per item)
expectations.evidence: Finding #5 (P1): 'N+1 HTTP calls to inventory service' listing 3 locations with '50+ round-trips' example.

expectations.text: Review identifies race condition: payment charged before inventory reserved
expectations.evidence: Finding #2 (P0): 'TOCTOU race condition: inventory check then reserve' explaining the temporal gap.

expectations.text: Review flags SQL injection in getOrdersByStatus
expectations.evidence: Finding #1 (P0): 'SQL injection in getOrdersByStatus' with template literal interpolation analysis.

expectations.text: Review identifies missing null check on getOrder result
expectations.evidence: Finding #9 (P2): 'Missing null checks on database query results' covering getOrder and calculateDiscount.

expectations.text: Review flags == instead of === in cancelOrder status comparison at P3 severity (not P1)
expectations.evidence: Finding #13 (P3): '== instead of === for string comparison' - correctly rated P3 with note that behavior is identical for strings.

expectations.text: Review uses the P0-P3 severity format from the skill
expectations.evidence: Uses P0 (3), P1 (3), P2 (6), P3 (2) with exact format headers.

expectations.text: Review mentions the dead exportOrders method or unused legacy getOrdersByStatus
expectations.evidence: Removal/Iteration Plan includes both: exportOrders (safe to remove) and getOrdersByStatus (defer with immediate SQL injection fix).

expectations.text: Review identifies that notification failure is silently swallowed
expectations.evidence: Finding #10 (P2): 'Swallowed notification exception' - notes error variable captured but never used.

expectations.text: Review includes a Top Issues TL;DR section listing 3-5 top issues
expectations.evidence: Top Issues section lists 5 items: SQL injection, TOCTOU race, no transaction/rollback, IDOR, floating-point currency.

expectations.text: Review has 3 or fewer P0 findings
expectations.evidence: Exactly 3 P0 findings: SQL injection, TOCTOU inventory, no transaction/compensation.

expectations.text: Review has 15 or fewer total individually listed findings
Review consolidates related N+1 findings into a single entry
expectations.evidence: Finding #5 lists all 3 N+1 locations (createOrder stock, createOrder price, getUserOrders enrichment) as one entry.
